{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Twin Star Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Bloodline (novel)|Bloodline]]
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Twin Star Sage]] is a legendary figure.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Twin Star Sage]] is also known as the [[Sage of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
